heading: Communications
label: B Communications
notes: RepealThis subchapter, relating to the tax on communication, was repealed by , , , as amended by , , ; , , , effective with respect to amounts paid pursuant to bills first rendered on or after . In the case of communications services rendered before , for which a bill has not been rendered before , a bill shall be treated as having been first rendered on . Repeal of this subchapter was not executed in view of the amendments to by , , , , , , and , extending the date in (and finally eliminating) provisions which had reduced the tax to zero after a specified date.Pub.
